case_title: DARROW BOGGIANO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGGIANO, DARROW ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2017 BY LESLIE C. NICHOLS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DARROW BOGGIANO. APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS' REPRESENTATIVES, NICHELLE FLENTRON & MARGARET CROWLEY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER AND SMALL CLAIMS OFFICE INTERN, RESPECTIVELY, FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D505).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $668.25 FILED BY BOGGIANO, DARROW AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SFMTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $20.00 SERVED MAY-05-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SFMTA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOGGIANO, DARROW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SFMTA JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (SFMTA) AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF DARROW BOGGIANO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGGIANO, DARROW AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SFMTA
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S CHALLENGE PER CCP 170 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOGGIANO, DARROW AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SFMTA
(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT, THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER. {X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2017 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A DIFFERENT JUDGE PER CCP 170.6. PLAINTIFF DARROW BOGGIANO APPEARED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SFMTA APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MARGARET CROWLEY, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED.
